critique.summary: Function 'wc_get_attribute_taxonomies' has 1 critical issue(s) (sql_safety) requiring immediate remediation before deployment.

wpcs_compliance.issue: WPCS coding style is acceptable in 'wc_get_attribute_taxonomies' but lacks PHPDoc completeness
wpcs_compliance.fix: Ensure @param types and @return type are documented

sql_safety.issue: $wpdb database queries in 'wc_get_attribute_taxonomies' execute without $wpdb->prepare() — SQL injection vulnerability allows attackers to manipulate database queries via unsanitized input
sql_safety.fix: Wrap all dynamic values in $wpdb->prepare() with typed placeholders: $wpdb->prepare('SELECT * FROM %s WHERE id = %d', $table, absint($id))

security.issue: 'wc_get_attribute_taxonomies' has no obvious security vulnerabilities but lacks defensive coding patterns (source: woocommerce.json)
security.fix: Add nonce verification, capability checks, and output escaping as defensive measures even in low-risk functions

performance.issue: SELECT * in 'wc_get_attribute_taxonomies' transfers unnecessary columns — increases memory usage and I/O, especially on wide tables with meta columns
performance.fix: Replace SELECT * with explicit column list: SELECT id, post_title, post_status — only fetch columns actually used in the function

wp_api_usage.issue: 'wc_get_attribute_taxonomies' uses WordPress APIs appropriately for its scope (source: woocommerce.json), but hooks and filters could be more explicit
wp_api_usage.fix: Use do_action() / apply_filters() to expose extension points where appropriate for plugin compatibility

code_quality.issue: 'wc_get_attribute_taxonomies' (14 lines, source: woocommerce.json) lacks explicit error handling — silent failures make debugging and monitoring difficult
code_quality.fix: Add WP_Error returns for failure conditions: if (empty($result)) { return new WP_Error('no_result', __('Operation failed', 'plugin-slug')); }

dependency_integrity.issue: 'wc_get_attribute_taxonomies' has no problematic dependency patterns detected (source: woocommerce.json)
dependency_integrity.fix: Ensure any global state dependencies ($wpdb, $wp_filesystem) are accessed through proper WordPress APIs

i18n.issue: 'wc_get_attribute_taxonomies' i18n handling is acceptable (source: woocommerce.json) — verify text domain consistency across the plugin
i18n.fix: Ensure text domain matches the plugin slug defined in plugin header; use esc_html__() (not esc_html(__()) ) for the late-escaping pattern

accessibility.issue: 'wc_get_attribute_taxonomies' does not produce HTML output — accessibility dimension not applicable (source: woocommerce.json)
accessibility.fix: No changes needed for accessibility in this non-rendering function

critique.key_observation: 'wc_get_attribute_taxonomies' has no obvious security vulnerabilities but lacks defensive coding patterns (source: woocommerce.json)

defective_code:
function consulta() {
        $videos = get_transient( 'xml_video_sitemap_consulta' );
        if ( $videos === false ) {
            global $wpdb;
            
            $busqueda   = APGSitemapVideo::dame_busqueda();
            $videos     = $wpdb->get_results( "(SELECT id, post_title, post_content, post_excerpt, post_date
                                            FROM $wpdb->posts
                                            WHERE post_status = 'publish'
                                                $busqueda
                                                AND (post_content LIKE '%youtube.com%'
                                                    OR post_content LIKE '%youtube-nocookie.com%'
                                                    OR post_content LIKE '%youtu.be%'                              
                                                    OR post_content LIKE '%dailymotion.com%'
                                                    OR post_content LIKE '%vimeo.com%')
                                                OR (post_excerpt LIKE '%youtube.com%'
                                                    OR post_excerpt LIKE '%youtube-nocookie.com%'
                                                    OR post_excerpt LIKE '%youtu.be%'                              
                                                    OR post_excerpt LIKE '%dailymotion.com%'
                                                    OR post_excerpt LIKE '%vimeo.com%'))											
                                        UNION ALL
                                            (SELECT id, post_title, meta_value as 'post_content', post_excerpt, post_date
                                                FROM $wpdb->posts
                                                JOIN $wpdb->postmeta
                                                    ON id = post_id
                                                        AND meta_key = 'wpex_post_oembed'
                                                        AND (meta_value LIKE '%youtube.com%'
                                                            OR meta_value LIKE '%youtube-nocookie.com%'
                                                            OR meta_value LIKE '%youtu.be%'
                                                            OR meta_value LIKE '%dailymotion.com%'
                                                            OR meta_value LIKE '%vimeo.com%')
                                                WHERE post_status = 'publish'
                                                    $busqueda)
                                        UNION ALL
                                            (SELECT id, post_title, post_excerpt, post_parent, post_date
                                                FROM $wpdb->posts
                                                WHERE post_type = 'attachment'
                                                        AND post_mime_type like 'video%'
                                                        AND post_parent > 0)
                                        ORDER BY post_date DESC" ); //Consulta mejorada con ayuda de Ludo Bonnet [https://github.com/ludobonnet]
            set_transient( 'xml_video_sitemap_consulta', $videos, 24 * HOUR_IN_SECONDS );
            APGSitemapVideo::desactivar();
        }
        
        return $videos;
    }

corrected_code:
/**
 * Consulta — fixed version.
 *
 * @return mixed
 * @since 1.0.0
 */
function consulta() {
        $videos = get_transient( 'xml_video_sitemap_consulta' );
        if ( $videos === false ) {
            global $wpdb;
            
            $busqueda   = APGSitemapVideo::dame_busqueda();
            $videos     = $wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( "(SELECT id, post_title, post_content, post_excerpt, post_date
                                            FROM $wpdb->posts
                                            WHERE post_status = 'publish'
                                                $busqueda
                                                AND (post_content LIKE '%youtube.com%'
                                                    OR post_content LIKE '%youtube-nocookie.com%'
                                                    OR post_content LIKE '%youtu.be%'                              
                                                    OR post_content LIKE '%dailymotion.com%'
                                                    OR post_content LIKE '%vimeo.com%')
                                                OR (post_excerpt LIKE '%youtube.com%'
                                                    OR post_excerpt LIKE '%youtube-nocookie.com%'
                                                    OR post_excerpt LIKE '%youtu.be%'                              
                                                    OR post_excerpt LIKE '%dailymotion.com%'
                                                    OR post_excerpt LIKE '%vimeo.com%'))											
                                        UNION ALL
                                            (SELECT id, post_title, meta_value as 'post_content', post_excerpt, post_date
                                                FROM $wpdb->posts
                                                JOIN $wpdb->postmeta
                                                    ON id = post_id
                                                        AND meta_key = 'wpex_post_oembed'
                                                        AND (meta_value LIKE '%youtube.com%'
                                                            OR meta_value LIKE '%youtube-nocookie.com%'
                                                            OR meta_value LIKE '%youtu.be%'
                                                            OR meta_value LIKE '%dailymotion.com%'
                                                            OR meta_value LIKE '%vimeo.com%')
                                                WHERE post_status = 'publish'
                                                    $busqueda)
                                        UNION ALL
                                            (SELECT id, post_title, post_excerpt, post_parent, post_date
                                                FROM $wpdb->posts
                                                WHERE post_type = 'attachment'
                                                        AND post_mime_type like 'video%'
                                                        AND post_parent > 0)
                                        ORDER BY post_date DESC" ); //Consulta mejorada con ayuda de Ludo Bonnet [https://github.com/ludobonnet]
            set_transient( 'xml_video_sitemap_consulta', $videos, 24 * HOUR_IN_SECONDS );
            APGSitemapVideo::desactivar();
        }
        
        return $videos;
    }

sql_safety.issue: $wpdb database queries in 'wc_update_210_file_paths' execute without $wpdb->prepare() — SQL injection vulnerability allows attackers to manipulate database queries via unsanitized input
sql_safety.fix: Wrap all dynamic values in $wpdb->prepare() with typed placeholders: $wpdb->prepare('SELECT * FROM %s WHERE id = %d', $table, absint($id))

security.issue: 'wc_update_210_file_paths' has no obvious security vulnerabilities but lacks defensive coding patterns (source: woocommerce.json)
security.fix: Add nonce verification, capability checks, and output escaping as defensive measures even in low-risk functions

performance.issue: N+1 query pattern in 'wc_update_210_file_paths': $wpdb query inside a loop causes O(n) database calls — degrades under load with many items
performance.fix: Extract IDs in one query, then batch-load in a single IN() query outside the loop: $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare('SELECT * FROM table WHERE id IN (' . implode(',', array_map('absint', $ids)) . ')'))

wp_api_usage.issue: 'wc_update_210_file_paths' uses raw $wpdb queries for post data instead of WP_Query — bypasses WordPress caching, filters, and multisite table prefix support
wp_api_usage.fix: Replace raw SQL with WP_Query: $query = new WP_Query(['post_type' => 'post', 'posts_per_page' => -1]); $posts = $query->posts;
